data.body:
It's not over yet!

To celebrate this special time with you, Sensei, we've prepared Special Weekend On-Time Gifts — log in to the game within the period below to claim yours! 🎁

➡️Details: https://forum.nexon.com/bluearchive-en/board_view?board=3028&thread=3430937
